subject: [PATCH v4 12/21] swap: implement the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch modifies the swap_cgroup API to use virtual swap, which allows for dynamic allocation of memory for swap entries' cgroup information. This reduces the memory overhead in large but sparsely used swap spaces by only allocating memory when needed. The patch removes the static array for storing swap entries' cgroup information and instead stores it in the swap descriptor. It also updates various files to reflect this change, including include/linux/swap_cgroup.h, mm/Makefile, and mm/vswap.c.
